excerpt: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. In many cases, though, the relevant information is blocked or unstructured, which limits its use by AI models.  To understand this challenge, consider the foundation of the web itself. excerpt: Jos Benschop is climbing a ladder to get to the top of his newest machine.  It’s a bit of a schlep.
